title: Automatic Trading Bot's $15,593 Profit in 2 Months - public 100K $ challenge report update
author: toqchista4
selftext:
Month two of the 100K Crypto Bot Challenge is complete, and the results are much more convincing than the early weekly sample. The bot generated $15,593 profit on $100,000 capital, which is about 15.5% over two months. A little bit less, but this performance fits into the 8–16% monthly range I set as the target from the start.

Now, with two months of data, the picture is clearer: the system is showing stability, controlled risk, and consistent compounding.

The bot is built in Python with around 5,000 lines of code and runs 10 profiles in parallel, each with its own configuration. Profiles differ in aggressiveness, timeframes, and directional bias, which creates diversification and protects against single-point failures. Adaptive RSI thresholds, staged entries, and portion-management math all work together to gradually improve entry prices and increase the probability of profitable exits.

After two months, it’s clear this isn’t about chasing one-off spikes but about building steady, repeatable gains. A few clients are already running it, and they’re satisfied with the results and even said they haven’t seen a strategy stronger than this one.

There’s also a **free test version for a demo account or mainnet, whichever you wish,** of the bot available so you can try it out yourself and see how it performs in real conditions.  Just let me know which aspect you’d like me to expand on.

comments.author: Strange_Ad_4257
